title: StorageLocation
description: A generic, extensible storage location entity for tracking where files are stored and how they are accessed.

storage_id.description: Unique identifier for the storage location.

system.description: Type of storage system (e.g., filesystem, s3, azure, gcs, nfs, etc.).

path.description: Path, URI, or bucket/container reference for the storage location.

description.description: Human-readable description of the storage location.

schema_version.description: Version of the storage location schema used to create this record. Follows semantic versioning (e.g., '1.0.0'). Optional but recommended for evolution and compatibility checks.

extensions.description: Extension point for custom fields or plugin data. Keys SHOULD be prefixed with 'x_' or 'custom_' to avoid collision with future standard fields.
